title: Hyperscaler concentration
description: Microsoft (£8.4m), Oracle (£3.1m) and SAP (£5.6m) collectively hold 68% of total IT software spend — high switching cost and pricing exposure.
mitigant: Dual-source where feasible; benchmark renewals against open-source / second-tier alternatives.

title: Oracle software audit
description: Active Oracle licensing audit (initiated Feb 2026). Exposure window estimated £600k–£1.2m. Legal engaged.
mitigant: Engage Oracle LMS; commission independent ELP (Effective Licence Position) review.

title: SAP ECC end-of-support 2027
description: On-premise ECC support ends Dec 2027. S/4HANA migration programme estimated £4.2m, 18-month timeline. Decision overdue.
mitigant: Approve migration BC by Q2 2026; consider RISE with SAP commercial bundle.

title: GenAI add-on cost trajectory
description: Copilot, Agentforce, Now Assist and Cortex AI add-ons projected to add £2.1m to FY26/27 budget if uptake hits forecast.
mitigant: Negotiate consumption caps and value-realisation clauses; pilot before enterprise rollout.

title: Certification compliance gap
description: 5 vendor certifications expired or expiring within 90 days. SAP Cyber Essentials Plus already in breach.
mitigant: Issue rectification notices; suspend new POs to non-compliant suppliers.

title: Pegasystems strategic uncertainty
description: Activist investor (Elliott) ~10% stake in Pega. Take-private rumours; product roadmap volatility risk.
mitigant: Activate alternative supplier diligence (Salesforce Service Cloud, ServiceNow CSM).

title: Snowflake consumption budget volatility
description: Q1 2026 Snowflake spend +38% above budget driven by ML workload growth; no committed-use discount in place.
mitigant: Move to capacity-based contract; implement query optimisation review board.

title: ESG Scope-3 reporting gaps
description: Oracle, Pega, Atlassian, Snowflake lack Scope 3 emissions reporting — gap vs. Centrica net-zero supply chain.
mitigant: Embed Scope-3 attestation clause in next renewal cycle for each.
